projectDescription: An open-source, 100% private local LLM platform for chatting with documents, images, and more, with an OpenAI-compatible API and support for dozens of model backends.
keyFeatures: 100% private local LLM chat with Gradio UI
Document Q&A with persistent vector databases (Chroma, FAISS, Weaviate)
Support for oLLaMa, vLLM, HF TGI, llama.cpp, GPT4All, and more
Vision models for image understanding (LLaVA, Claude, Gemini)
Voice STT/TTS with Whisper and Microsoft SpeechT5
Image generation with Stable Diffusion and Flux
Web search integration with document Q&A
AI Agents for search, Python code, CSV, and document tasks
Fine-tuning support with LoRA and full training
Linux, Docker, macOS, and Windows support
publicApiSurface: POST /v1/chat/completions — OpenAI-compatible chat completions (streaming and non-streaming)
python generate.py — Main entry point CLI with dozens of flags
h2ogpt_generate — PyPI console script entry point
h2ogpt_finetune — Fine-tuning console script entry point
Gradio API — All UI buttons accessible via Gradio client API
